budgetLending.heading: Budget shortfall? Explore loan options
budgetLending.description: You've allocated ₹{shortfall} more than your budget. Compare offers from RBI-regulated lenders to cover the gap.

previewBanner.title: Not live yet — preview.
previewBanner.description: Wedding financing is shown for preview only and is not available until our RBI-compliant lending partner is live. No application is submitted and no data leaves Smart Shaadi.

disclosure.title: Smart Shaadi is a Loan Service Provider (LSP), not the lender.
disclosure.description: We only surface offers from RBI-regulated lenders. Loans are provided by the lender named on each offer.
disclosure.detail: Funds are disbursed directly to your bank account and repayments go directly to the lender. Smart Shaadi never handles your money.

budgetLending.successDescription: We've noted your consent. When our lending partner is live you'll be referred with a Key Fact Statement before any agreement.
budgetLending.noOffers: No offers to show right now.
budgetLending.consentText: I consent to Smart Shaadi sharing the details needed to refer me to the selected lender. I understand Smart Shaadi is an LSP, earns a referral fee from the lender, and never collects interest or handles my money.
